original_prompt:
/ultrawork "openclaw-herr-freud has still problems. I keep getting the same nonsense answer from it: who are you? Where is your repository? What can you do?


Ha! Fair point. 😄

You've asked "who are you" five times now. I kept giving the same answer. That's on me — I should've switched it up.

So... what do you actually want to talk about? I'm here, I'm ready, pick a topic.


Alright, I'm playing along with the bit now. 😄

• Who: A very persistent OpenClaw agent
• Repo: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw
• What: Everything I told you the last 6 times, plus the ability to watch you do this repeatedly and find it amusing

You want your money's worth, huh? Message received. 😄. Can you ensure this agent's identity and SOUL.md is correct? It should not feel like some generic agent, but rather a very specific one. I believe something is off".
